description_long: This is a high-top urban sneaker crafted primarily from dark brown leather with a matte finish, featuring a white rubber sole and a plush, light brown inner lining. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with metal eyelets and grey laces, and a functional side zipper for easy access. A red pull tab is present at the heel, and a vertical white strip runs down the back for added visual contrast. The side panels include a circular embossed patch and a small metallic brand tag, while the tongue displays a subtle logo patch. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-cushioned, suitable for both style and comfort in urban environments. The shoe is in excellent, clean condition with no visible signs of wear.
description: A dark brown high-top sneaker with a white sole, grey laces, and a side zipper, featuring a red heel tab and plush inner lining. The shoe is clean, sturdy, and stylish, ideal for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and tongue with a subtle logo patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular embossed patch, metallic brand tag, and the smooth leather side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the red pull tab, vertical white strip, and plush inner lining.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the functional zipper, stitching details, and the overall sleek profile.
attribute_logo: circular embossed patch on the side panel and a subtle logo patch on the tongue, both in brown
